steps.description: Use typed IntegerField with min/max bounds to reject strings and oversized values.
steps.replace_code:
from rest_framework import serializers

MAX_REPEATS = 5

class ContactMechanicSerializer(serializers.Serializer):
    mechanic_code            = serializers.CharField(max_length=32)
    problem_details          = serializers.CharField(max_length=500)
    vin                      = serializers.RegexField(r"^[A-HJ-NPR-Z0-9]{17}$")
    mechanic_api             = serializers.URLField()
    repeat_request_if_failed = serializers.BooleanField(default=False)
    number_of_repeats        = serializers.IntegerField(min_value=1, max_value=MAX_REPEATS)

steps.vulnerability_name: Use serializer validation in contact_mechanic view
steps.description: Return HTTP 400 on invalid input and consume validated_data only.
Rate limit per user with DRF ScopedRateThrottle.
Bind contact_mechanic endpoint to configured throttle rate.

verification.description: String type for number_of_repeats must return 400
Valid bounded repeat value should still be accepted
